metaDescription: Mistral NeMo (12B) (Mistral AI), released 2024-07-18 — part of the Mistral 7B / Nemo (open dense) line. 12B dense model built with NVIDIA, 128k context, Apache…
overview: Mistral NeMo (12B) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral 7B / Nemo (open dense) line. Released 2024-07-18. Legacy open-weight dense base models.
What's notable in this version: 12B dense model built with NVIDIA, 128k context, Apache 2.0 (open-mistral-nemo).
